title: わがままテイオーと思い出の景色

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Tokai Teio lets out a long groan. That's unusual.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Well, no one's been praising me lately!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I need compliments! Or else I lose all motivation!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
And here I was wondering what all the fuss was
about. What a child you are.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: However...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Hehe. I know just the place for one such as you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm a little worried about Mejiro McQueen's smile,
so I decide to follow the two of them.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: ...You tricked me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I have told no lies. What better way to earn
acclaim than devoting yourself to charitable
work?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Yeah, but this is just volunteering at a park...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Look sharp, Teio. You must pick up all the
garbage around here.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: (This is not what I was thinking at all!)

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I'm taking five. No one's around here anyway.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
(If I'm not even gonna get compliments, I'd rather
just go back and train.)

text_block_list.name: Old Lady
text_block_list.text:
Why, hello there. Are you here to clean up the
park for us?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Huh? Oh, uh, yeah!

text_block_list.name: Old Lady
text_block_list.text:
Well, isn't that just the loveliest thing. There's
been less litter and graffiti around lately thanks
to kind young folk like you.

text_block_list.name: Old Lady
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it looks just like it used to back in the old
days. That there's the pond my husband was so
fond of...

text_block_list.name: Old Lady
text_block_list.text:
And there's the bench where we used to sit and
chat with each other. I really can't thank you
enough.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Um, well, my break is almost over so I have to get
back to it. See ya!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hey! Give me a job to do! I'll do anything!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I was wondering where you'd gone off to. Why so
eager all of a sudden?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Well, I...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tokai Teio recounts her meeting with the old
lady.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I also have a really important memory. Back when
I watched Prez race right after enrolling!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Out there on the turf, she seemed like the sun to
me. Even now, I can see her clear as day.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
So if this park has important memories for that
old lady, I want to protect it!
choice_data_list: Then you're on graffiti removal duty!
Then you're on graffiti removal duty!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
So if this park has important memories for that
old lady, I want to protect it!
choice_data_list: Then you're on graffiti removal duty!
Then you're on graffiti removal duty!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Yeah, we're on it! Let's go, McQueen!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to their efforts, all the park's litter is
gathered in one place in the blink of an eye.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: What a beautiful sight.

text_block_list.name: Old Lady
text_block_list.text: Oh, well look who it is!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Oh, hey! We just finished cleaning up!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Wow, it's all green and sparkly like racing turf!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: And just like it was in your memories, I hope. ♪

text_block_list.name: Old Lady
text_block_list.text: Haha, indeed it is. Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As she gazes at her handiwork with the old lady,
Teio seems to stand a little taller than before.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Yeah, we're on it! Let's go, McQueen!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
The gall of some people! Drawing graffiti on
public property... Truly a childish and selfish act.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
(Selfish, huh... I was acting pretty selfish back
there too.)

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Okay! Let's get this wall squeaky clean on the
double!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to their efforts, all the graffiti around the
park is gone in the blink of an eye.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Oh? That old lady waving at us... Is she the one
you mentioned?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: It is! I'm gonna go tell her the good news!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hellooo! The park is all clean now! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I watch Tokai Teio rush off, I feel like she's
grown quite a bit.
